name: whatsapp-number-validator
description: Professional bulk WhatsApp number registration validator

scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.dev: node -e "const { spawn } = require('child_process'); spawn('npm', ['run', 'dev'], { cwd: './backend', stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); spawn('npm', ['run', 'dev'], { cwd: './frontend', stdio: 'inherit', shell: true });"
